reviews.review_description: It won't let me install the app from Google play to create a profile

T-ON FITNESS shines with its gentle and engaging approach to fitness in VR. It offers three distinct modes: Adventure, where you progress at your own pace, sometimes playfully, in charming settings; Fitness, guided by your virtual coach KIKI who adapts the exercises to your level; and Meditation, to end on a relaxing note.
This mix allows you to vary your effort and then refocus while remaining motivated. The movements, derived from expert research (94 techniques), are simple but effective, ideal for beginners or staying in shape without equipment. Immersion is amplified by the colorful and lively environments—you'll sometimes smile at the small animal's support or an unexpected exercise.
Perfect for daily, fun, and comprehensive sessions, when you're short on time and need to reconnect.
Notes:
Tracking can vary depending on the lighting, and an open area is preferable. You must create an account via a free mobile companion app.
My video review in french: https://youtu.be/F5sGZVJQgM4

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for sharing your thoughtful review.
As you mentioned, T-ON FITNESS is designed to deliver both fun and effective VR fitness experiences.
We’re truly delighted to hear that you enjoyed the different modes and expert-based workout programs.

We will continue to bring you more diverse content and improved services so you can easily build a daily fitness habit.
If you ever experience any inconvenience or have suggestions, please feel free to share them with us—your feedback is our greatest motivation.

Once again, thank you sincerely, and we hope T-ON FITNESS will keep supporting your health and happiness every day.

reviews.review_description: I only did the first session (burned about 200 calories and the 5 minute meditation). It reminds me a lot of Nintendo’s ring fit, only so far it’s been focused on lower body exercises. Perhaps that’s what the devs thought were best for the Quest — which means it’d be great for leg day. I hope the meditations aren’t mandatory in the future. I’m hesitant to move too far ahead because I couldn’t create an account and am using it as a guest - it needs a phone number, but when I put mine in, it wont work. I figured it might need an area code (+1 for the US) but that doesn’t work either :( getting the app was tricky too as searching t-on doesn’t show up in the iOS store. The game is very cute though and I’m looking forward to exploring it all!

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you so much for taking the time to leave your valuable review. 😊
We are currently working on introducing an option to sign up using email instead of phone verification to make the registration process more convenient for our iOS users. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused. 🙇‍♀️ We will continue striving to provide you with the best possible service!

reviews.review_description: I love this! It's so cute and motivating!! The design is super fun, and it makes working out feel like less of a chore and more of a game. The T-ON animal friends are adorable too, they totally remind me of Kakao Friends! I also downloaded the T-ON app to track my progress, which has been really helpful in keeping me on track. I’ve been wanting a fitness game like this for ages, and I'm so happy I finally found it. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for a fun way to stay fit! 감사합니다!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your thoughtful and heartfelt feedback! 🙏 We’re thrilled to hear that you enjoyed our T-ON Friends characters and found exercising with us as fun as playing a game! It makes us so happy to know that our app has helped keep you motivated and provided the fitness experience you’ve been looking for all along.

We’ll continue to bring you even more adorable and fun content to help you stay healthy and happy. Wishing you a joyful and successful fitness journey! 💪😊 If you have any questions or suggestions for improvement, please don’t hesitate to let us know. Thank you! 🎉

reviews.review_description: This app is really great. Various exercises are possible without exercise equipment. If I wear the device on my head, the walking course unfolds in my room. Cute animals cheer for my exercise. This app also gives me exercise results. I get motivated by this result. People who hate exercise but love games will love this app.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review. We will continue to update exercise movements and content regularly, so we appreciate your ongoing interest.

reviews.review_title: I like being able to exercise anytime!
reviews.review_description: Customized workout programs are provided, and it's great that you can do them at home without needing to go to a fitness center
